source: 用户提供的 Chrome 应用商店娱乐分类页面文本

items.name: Netflix Party is now Teleparty
items.description: Watch Netflix, Youtube, Disney Plus, Max and more in sync with friends

items.name: Watch2Gether
items.description: The official Watch2Gether (W2G) extension - Watch videos together with your friends.

items.name: FetchV - M3U8/HLS视频下载器
items.description: 用于嗅探、保存网页视频和直播的视频下载器。

items.name: Equalizer for Chrome Browser
items.description: 适用于Chrome的均衡器。 通过10个乐队自定义声音，均衡器预设与所有音乐流派

items.name: FantasyPros: Win your Fantasy League
items.description: Get expert advice for your fantasy team from any website

items.name: Sweezy Cursors ★ Chrome 的自定义光标
items.description: 动画光标。 可爱的光标。 自定义光标。 从大量酷炫的光标中将鼠标光标更改为自定义光标，或上传您自己的光标。

items.name: FastSave
items.description: 重新发布Instagram故事，保存视频，照片和Reels。像移动应用一样浏览Instagram网站。

items.name: 终极视频下载器 - 免费视频保存器
items.description: 快速，有用且易于使用的视频下载器，用于保存您喜欢的在线内容。享受无限制和无缝的下载！

items.name: Happy dog - virtual pet for you and friends
items.description: An AI companion you can chat with, care for, and co-parent with your friends

items.name: Flickcall: Netflix Party with Video Call
items.description: Create watch party on Netflix, Jiocinema, Hotstar, Amazon Prime Video, JioHotstar & more. Watch movies & TV show together in sync.

items.name: Google™ 特別塗鴉 - Google Chrome™ 自定義徽標
items.description: 用令人驚嘆的塗鴉圖片更改 Google 徽標。 在您的主頁上安裝您自己的文字並用有趣的東西替換 Google Doodle

items.name: Sweezy 自定义YouTube™进度条
items.description: 改善您在YouTube上的体验！用有趣的动画和色彩替换单调的进度条。是时候以时尚的方式来玩耍了！

items.name: Sync Watch
items.description: Watch videos together at the same time!

items.name: Chrome 视频下载器
items.description: 从 TikTok、Instagram、Facebook、Vimeo、Twitch 等网站下载视频。浏览网页时自动检测可下载的视频内容

items.name: Bro-Mon 🐾 浏览器怪兽 - 网页冲浪游戏
items.description: 加入Bro-Mon游戏，享受史诗级网页乐趣！在浏览器上网页冲浪时捕捉野生怪兽。#SurfAndSnatch

items.name: MEOWSING
items.description: The more you move the mouse cursor, the more cats gather from beyond the window.

items.name: Better Lyrics (Lyrics for Youtube Music)
items.description: 使用精美的同步歌词、多语言支持、实时翻译等功能增强 YouTube Music

items.name: Sauce for Strava™
items.description: Additional functionality for your cycling and running analysis. This extension upgrades the Strava™ website.

items.name: VLC在线-多媒体播放器
items.description: 使用此在线分发的 VLC 播放大多数多媒体文件和各种流媒体协议。

items.name: YouTube Music™ 主题音乐（增强器）
items.description: YouTube Music™ 的增强器。动态主题，可视化效果，歌词，定时器，通知等等！

items.name: Streaming enhanced Netflix Disney Prime Video
items.description: Skip ads, intros, credits and add adjust speed, etc. on Netflix, Prime video, Disney+, Crunchyroll and HBO max.

items.name: Audio Equalizer - EQ
items.description: Audio Equalizer - adjust volume of sound, bass booster, sound booster, dim the highs. EQ Audio Equalizer for all webs!

items.name: Best Cursors - Bloom of Custom Cursor
items.description: Funny, cute and original custom cursor collections with popular topics. Use Best Cursors to change the default pointer with custom

items.name: AD Skipper for Youtube
items.description: 通过自动跳过视频广告来增强您的 YouTube 体验。

items.name: Fluid Simulation - Stress Reliever
items.description: Fluid Simulation helps with relaxation, stress relief, anxiety and pure enjoyment

items.name: Advanced Audio Equalizer
items.description: Enhance your online audio experience with the Advanced Audio Equalizer. Fine-tune your tab audio in real-time

items.name: SynQ for Spotify, YouTube, Amazon Music, more
items.description: Mini player with universal music sharing for Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, and Amazon Music.

items.name: Dmooji - YouTube弹幕和AI角色聊天
items.description: 通过弹幕和AI角色聊天增强YouTube体验！一起观看，与AI角色聊天，以全新方式观看视频。

items.name: Mouse Cursor - Custom Cursor
items.description: Rock your custom cursor into a world of dreams! Explore a new galaxy of stylish and cool cursors!

items.name: Manga Reader and Tracker - MangaPin
items.description: Supercharge manga websites with manga reader mode, library management, offline reading, external trackers and many exciting features

items.name: 视频画质增强器 • AI 4K 放大、锐化、亮度、伽马与色彩修复
items.description: 快速提升所有流媒体网站的视频画质：YouTube、Netflix、Twitch 等！一键锐化与色彩校正。

items.name: Video Maximizer - 缩放至窗口大小
items.description: 快速安全地放大视频以填充浏览器窗口。当全屏模式太大时，您可以自由控制视频大小。

items.name: 哔哩哔哩(Bilibili)播放器扩展
items.description: 为B站播放器提供快捷键以及调整默认状态的功能，如关闭弹幕、截图、画中画等。

items.name: 超宽屏流媒体：自定义比例 [QVI]
items.description: 在超宽屏显示器上使用全屏。将视频调整为 21:9、32:9 或自定义比例。支持大多数平台。

items.name: Microsoft to Microslop
items.description: Replaces every mention of 'Microsoft' with 'Microslop'

items.name: Animal Crossing Radio | Live Hourly Animal Crossing Music
items.description: Animal Crossing music from all the games in live ! Enjoy the best hourly Animal Crossing music right now !

items.name: VeloViewer Strava Plugin
items.description: Additions to Strava website to provide helpful links and features for VeloViewer.

items.name: 语言反应堆转换：由AI助长
items.description: 不是语言反应堆。更好的东西 - 由AI提供动力

items.name: Basketball Box Scores
items.description: The best NBA browser extension with box scores, standings, highlights and more!

items.name: Vimeo Downloader - 高清视频与音频
items.description: 智能队列高清下载 Vimeo 视频。支持音频导出、字幕保存、批量下载管理，Chrome 最强 Vimeo 下载器。

items.name: Netflix Hidden Categories
items.description: Get access all hidden categories on Netflix.

items.name: F1 Now
items.description: Formula One World Championship Information. (Unofficial).

items.name: YouTube Booster
items.description: Video speed, AI summary, Subtitles, audio normalization, OSINT, auto pause, looped #shorts, video markers, keywords, and more...

items.name: Webnovel Translator by OpenNovel
items.description: Translate Chinese, Korean and Japanese novels from popular websites and epubs.

items.name: Random YouTube Video
items.description: Customize, shuffle and play random videos from any YouTube channel.

items.name: Blooket Hacker - any page
items.description: A comprehensive utility tool for Blooket platforms on any page.

items.name: Airs Audio - Bass Booster & Equalizer
items.description: EQ any audio you find on the web in real time with a powerful audio equalizer and bass booster designed for precise sound control.

items.name: Live Cricket Score Bar
items.description: Get Live Cricket scores of today's matches updated on real-time. A totally new experience scoreboard as seen on TV broadcasts.

items.name: YouTube Music Web Player Search
items.description: Quickly search the YouTube Music Web Player using the popup, right-click menu or Omnibox (YTM+Tab).

items.name: Netflix评分：现支持HBO Max和Prime [QVI]
items.description: Netflix、Prime Video、HBO Max、Hulu等多部电影及电视剧评分！

items.name: StretchView
items.description: Remove black bars from streaming videos. Control aspect ratio, use PiP mode, and enhance video playback on popular platforms

items.name: Moto X3M Bike Race Game in Browser - Free & Offline available
items.description: Play Moto X3M Bike Race Game in Browser - Offline available - No ads - Free

items.name: Anu Twitch Chat Overlay
items.description: Show Twitch chat on top of the stream player. Read chat, send messages, claim points, and more, without leaving fullscreen mode

items.name: Teleparty-pro
items.description: Sync up your favorite Netflix, Disney Plus, Hulu, HBO, and worldwide OTT platform shows with friends using our Teleparty

items.name: TV Show Tracker
items.description: Keep track of your favourite TV shows.

items.name: YouTube to Spotify with Paradify
items.description: Single song or Playlist transfer from YouTube to Spotify by one-click

items.name: Volume Booster — 提高音量
items.description: 此扩展程序允许您将浏览器标签页的音量提高到 600%，以获得更好的音质。

items.name: F1 Delayed Live Timing
items.description: Delay F1 live timing feed and add additional visualisations.

items.name: SoundCloud Enhanced Pro – Download & Track Info by UnifyBrowse
items.description: Enhanced SoundCloud experience with detailed track information, statistics, and audio tools

items.name: OshiKoi: AI Mate in Your Browser
items.description: OshiKoi 是一位 3D AI 伙伴，会在你浏览网页时一直陪伴你。

items.name: Twitch High Quality
items.description: Force Twitch streams to use source quality and prevent downscaling

items.name: SLyrics
items.description: Instant synchronized lyrics display in picture-in-picture window

items.name: Manga Translator Extension
items.description: AI-Powered Translator for RAW Manga, Manhua & Manhwa

items.name: Prime Video Enhancer
items.description: Enhance your Amazon Prime Video experience
